programme.desc: Indonesian news and culture, in English
A folksy New England poet (Gary Cooper) inherits $20 million he doesn't want and tells a New York newswoman (Jean Arthur) why.
programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes to Town

programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely.
programme.title: Logan's Run

programme.desc: Scout William F. Cody (Joel McCrea) marries a U.S. senator's daughter (Maureen O'Hara), fights the Cheyenne and leads a Wild West show.
programme.title: Buffalo Bill

programme.desc: A French TV newswoman (Joanna Lumley) interviews friends and foes of the missing Inspector Clouseau (Peter Sellers).
programme.title: Trail of the Pink Panther

programme.desc: Wandering gunfighter Joe arrives in the Mexican village of San Miguel in the midst of a power struggle among sheriff John Baxter and the three Rojo brothers. He is hired by Esteban Rojo to join their gang, but he plays one side against the other.
programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars

programme.desc: Engaged to others, two cruise-ship passengers (Cary Grant, Deborah Kerr) plan to reunite six months later atop the Empire State Building.
programme.title: An Affair to Remember

programme.desc: A sheriff's meek wife (Vera Miles) makes a run for the Mexican border with an outlaw (Sam Elliott) her husband was going to hang.
programme.title: Molly and Lawless John

programme.desc: A harmonica player (James Stewart) woos a landlady's daughter (Paulette Goddard) and joins a conductor's (Horace Heidt) orchestra.
programme.title: Pot o' Gold

programme.desc: Ax murders follow a heart attack at an Irish castle full of mourners (William Campbell, Luana Anders, Bart Patton).
programme.title: Dementia 13

programme.desc: In order to help bring Nazis to justice, a U.S. agent brings a traitor's daughter to Rio de Janeiro to seduce an exiled Nazi.
programme.title: Notorious

programme.desc: When a dirty Scotland Yard cop is linked to a string of robberies across Europe, the agency asks a famous French detective (Alan Arkin) to help them find the culprits.
programme.title: Inspector Clouseau

programme.desc: A runaway wife (Madge Evans), a fugitive (Bruce Cabot) and other plane-crash survivors find a hermit's (John Boles) island.
programme.title: Sinners in Paradise

programme.desc: A student hooker (Annie Potts) in a van picks up a Las Vegas-bound teen (Mark Hamill) on the trail of a stolen Stingray.
programme.title: Corvette Summer

programme.desc: A man in black (Yul Brynner) recruits six hired guns to lead Mexican villagers against the gang of an outlaw (Eli Wallach).
programme.title: The Magnificent Seven

programme.desc: A poor Chicago secretary (Diana Ross) takes the fast lane to fame as a model and a fashion designer.
programme.title: Mahogany

programme.desc: When scientists suspect that an alien force is attacking Earth, they send two spaceships to weaken the enemy.
programme.title: Battle in Outer Space

programme.desc: British pirate William Kidd captures Adm. Blaine's treasure ship and hides the bounty in a cave. Three years later, Kidd, posing as a sea captain, offers his services to the king as an escort ship.
programme.title: Captain Kidd

programme.desc: White liberals must overcome their own latent racism when their strong-willed daughter announces her intention to marry a distinguished black physician.
programme.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner

programme.desc: Goofy professor Kelp's potion turns him into Buddy Love, a lounge singer at ease with a coed and a crowd.
programme.title: The Nutty Professor

programme.desc: Mark Twain's boy hero (Tommy Kelly) watches his own funeral with Huck Finn (Jackie Moran) and enters a cave with Becky (Ann Gillis), chased by Injun Joe.
programme.title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer

programme.desc: Unlucky in love, an 1880s Midwestern schoolteacher devotes 50 years of her life to her students.
programme.title: Cheers for Miss Bishop

programme.desc: A massive tidal wave hits the island, bringing stranded Gilligan, Skipper and the rest of the gang back to civilization.
programme.title: Rescue From Gilligan's Island

programme.desc: A space scientist (Hugh Marlowe) figures out how to down a fleet of alien spacecraft looming over Washington, D.C.
programme.title: Earth vs. the Flying Saucers

programme.desc: U.S. soldiers (Van Johnson, John Hodiak, Ricardo Montalban) from all over fight in the Battle of the Bulge.
programme.title: Battleground

programme.desc: A Brooklyn bookkeeper (Don Knotts) falls off a pier, turns into a fish and helps the Navy track U-boats.
programme.title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet

programme.desc: S01 E23 — Joby A stable boy helps Stoney and Ves by subduing two men who are trying to rob the rodeo office.
programme.title: Stoney Burke

programme.desc: Railway police take action when kidnappers choose their busy station as the drop-off point for their ransom money.
programme.title: Union Station

programme.desc: Bumpkins Moe, Larry and Curly Joe (The Three Stooges) help an ice-skating Snow White (Carol Heiss) find her Prince Charming (Edson Stroll).
programme.title: Snow White and the Three Stooges

programme.desc: A pet deer changes a boy (Claude Jarman Jr.) and his parents (Gregory Peck, Jane Wyman), pioneering farmers in Florida after the Civil War.
programme.title: The Yearling

programme.desc: Two Montana cowboys (Jerry Reed, Tom Selleck) head for Nashville and help a woman (Morgan Fairchild) find her sister.
programme.title: The Concrete Cowboys

programme.desc: A San Francisco playgirl (Tippi Hedren) follows a bachelor (Rod Taylor) to Bodega Bay where, for no apparent reason, flocks of birds begin killing the populace.
programme.title: The Birds

programme.desc: The muscular hero forms Ursa Major and fights space robots to save a princess who has been kidnapped.
programme.title: Hercules

programme.desc: An ex-convict bandit (Marlon Brando) finds the partner (Karl Malden) who betrayed him is now a town sheriff with a wife (Katy Jurado) and daughter.
programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks

programme.desc: A stewardess (Doris Day) runs for her life once she realizes her second husband (Louis Jourdan) killed her first.
programme.title: Julie

programme.desc: Socialite Irene Bullock needs a forgotten man to win a scavenger hunt and finds Godfrey Park, who resides in a dump by the East River. She hires him as a butler, to the chagrin of her spoiled sister Cornelia, who seeks to get Godfrey fired.
programme.title: My Man Godfrey

programme.desc: Blondie (Penny Singleton) fills in for Dagwood (Arthur Lake) at the office, so he can go on a fishing trip.
programme.title: Blondie Meets the Boss

programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes (Basil Rathbone) and Dr. Watson (Nigel Bruce) prowl foggy moors to save Sir Henry (Richard Greene) from a killer-dog family curse.
programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles

programme.desc: A hit man (Frank Sinatra) and company plan to shoot the president when he gets off his train in Suddenly, Calif.
programme.title: Suddenly

programme.desc: A lovesick attorney (Raymond Burr) tries to trap a murder client (Angela Lansbury) he got acquitted by arranging for her to kill him.
programme.title: Please Murder Me

programme.desc: Two brothers (Spencer Tracy, Robert Wagner) climb to a plane crash in the Alps: one to help, the other to loot.
programme.title: The Mountain

programme.desc: Two brothers (Spencer Tracy, Robert Wagner) climb to a plane crash in the Alps: one to help, the other to loot.
programme.title: The Mountain

programme.desc: Sam Craig, a New York sportswriter marries Tess Harding, a political columnist whose career comes first.
programme.title: Woman of the Year

programme.desc: International swindlers are diverted from their sinister dealings when an explosion wrecks the ship they are aboard.
programme.title: Beat the Devil

programme.desc: When a dirty Scotland Yard cop is linked to a string of robberies across Europe, the agency asks a famous French detective (Alan Arkin) to help them find the culprits.
programme.title: Inspector Clouseau

programme.desc: A folksy New England poet (Gary Cooper) inherits $20 million he doesn't want and tells a New York newswoman (Jean Arthur) why.
programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes to Town

programme.title: Stagecoach

programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S04 E09 — Drunken Murderer Police discover a drunk woman's husband lying in the street.
programme.title: BodyCam by Law&Crime

programme.desc: S01 E04 — Spring Break The wildest spring break arrests in Florida.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S05 E11 — Insane Police Chases Police chase reckless drivers, daring ATV escapes and stolen mail trucks.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S03 E08 — Mom Meltdowns Part 1 Moms are sometimes caught having major meltdowns when confronted by cops, struggling to handle the situation.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S02 E19 — Worst Excuses, Part One People pulled over often make excuses for breaking the law, especially when alcohol makes them incoherent.
programme.title: Most Outrageous Crimes

programme.desc: S01 E112 — Viper in the Floorboards Officers make contact with two suspicious men standing outside a store but when they ask them questions and pat them down, the men try to get away; a woman calls cops because a baby snake is hiding in her closet.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E113 — Cupid Scuffle Cops respond to a domestic disturbance call but when they arrive the male flees on foot; two females are arrested in an undercover drug deal of prescription pills.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E114 — Copy That Officers respond to a call of a victim claiming she was assaulted by two men because her boyfriend owed them money; a car chase ensues when cops observe a driver who fails to signal a lane change.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E115 — Am I Being Punkd? Cops come to arrest a man for drug possession, but he takes off running; cops stop to check up on a car sitting on the side of the road.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E116 — Almost Famous Cops respond to a domestic violence call when a man pushes his girlfriend out of a moving vehicle because he did not want her to know it was stolen; a man is arrested for the use of drugs and several outstanding warrants.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E117 — Running into Danger An ex-girlfriend breaks into her ex's home when he has a restraining order on her; cops search a car of a man who failed to use his light when changing lanes, but when cops search the car, they find marijuana and cocaine.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E118 — Tech 9 Crime A young boy is found in a suspect's apartment after being kidnapped; a suspicious car is pulled over for having the wrong license plate, but when he talks to the officers, they notice he has crack-cocaine in his mouth.
programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.desc: S01 E119 — Street Pigeon A burglary suspect, who is in possession of several pieces of jewelry, is found and arrested; officers respond to a call involving a man who is approached by another man who is armed and has just robbed a bank.
